specific_mechanism: HB-KV: bounded functional + norm-preserving extension + ε-threshold pruning
llm_application: Define a bounded linear functional that scores past-context tokens by 'essential info'; extend this functional to the full context via a norm-preserving construction; drop cached tokens whose extended-functional value is below ε.
novelty_claim: KVzip/CompAct compress via SVD/quantization; Hahn-Banach norm-preserving is conservation-law-based.
